title: North Devon: Lynmouth Esplanade cliff stabilisation works procurement
description: North Devon District Council published a tender notice for cliff stabilisation works at Lynmouth Esplanade, covering repairs and maintenance to existing rockfall mitigation measures (including netting) to improve safety and resilience along the coastal frontage.
statusRationale: A UK4 tender notice has been published for the Lynmouth Esplanade cliff stabilisation works, indicating the project is in procurement.
locationSource: Find a Tender (North Devon District Council)

evidence.title: NDC0068-25 - Lynmouth Esplanade Cliff Stabilisation (tender notice)
evidence.source: Find a Tender (North Devon District Council)
evidence.summary: Tender notice for works to stabilise the Lynmouth Esplanade cliff, including repairs and maintenance to existing rockfall mitigation measures such as netting.

title: Wiltshire: M4 Junction 17 improvement works procurement
description: Wiltshire Council issued a tender notice for works to improve M4 Junction 17, covering highway and traffic signal upgrades including widening and additional lane provision, supporting improved capacity and network performance at the junction.
statusRationale: A UK4 tender notice has been published for M4 Junction 17 improvement works, indicating the scheme is at procurement stage.

evidence.title: HE0915 - M4 JUNCTION 17 IMPROVEMENT WORKS (tender notice)
evidence.summary: Tender notice describing highway improvement works at M4 Junction 17, including traffic signal upgrades and capacity enhancements.

title: Merton: £30m council investment to progress ‘Remaking Morden’ regeneration
description: The London Borough of Merton announced plans to commit £30 million to progress its ‘Remaking Morden’ regeneration ambitions, including town-centre renewal and preparation to secure a private-sector development partner.
statusRationale: The council has publicly set out funding plans and the next steps toward delivery, including progressing approvals and partnership procurement.
locationDescription: Morden town centre, London Borough of Merton

evidence.title: Morden regeneration set for major step forward with £30 million funding boost
evidence.summary: Council announcement describing a planned £30m investment to move forward the Remaking Morden regeneration programme and progress toward securing a development partner.

title: Milton Keynes: residential electric vehicle (EV) chargers rollout procurement
description: Milton Keynes City Council published a tender notice for the supply and installation of residential EV chargers, supporting the rollout of local charging infrastructure for residents.
statusRationale: A UK4 tender notice has been published for residential EV charger supply and installation, indicating the rollout is in procurement.
locationDescription: Milton Keynes (residential on-street/off-street locations to be confirmed)
locationSource: Find a Tender (Milton Keynes City Council)

evidence.title: Residential EV Chargers - tender notice
evidence.source: Find a Tender (Milton Keynes City Council)
evidence.summary: Tender notice for the supply and installation of residential electric vehicle chargers for Milton Keynes City Council.

title: Stratford-on-Avon: Stratford-upon-Avon Gateway masterplan and regeneration funding
description: Stratford-on-Avon District Council progressed regeneration plans for the Stratford-upon-Avon Gateway area, including adoption of a masterplan and approval of funding to support delivery of initial phases and enabling works.
statusRationale: The masterplan has been adopted and the council has approved funding, but delivery remains subject to subsequent procurement, detailed design and planning steps.

evidence.title: Stratford-upon-Avon Gateway masterplan (adoption)
evidence.summary: Council planning page describing the Stratford-upon-Avon Gateway masterplan and stating that it was adopted on 22 April 2024.

evidence.title: Funding approved for Stratford-upon-Avon Gateway project
evidence.summary: Council news item reporting approval of funding to support progress of the Stratford-upon-Avon Gateway project.

title: Breckland: Thetford Leisure Centre 3G football pitch handed over
description: Breckland Council announced the official handover of a new 3G football pitch at Thetford Leisure Centre, upgrading local sports infrastructure and supporting year-round community and club use.
statusRationale: The council reports the new pitch has been officially handed over, indicating completion and entry into operational use.

evidence.title: Goal! New 3G football pitch officially handed over to Breckland Council
evidence.summary: Council announcement confirming the handover of a new 3G football pitch at Thetford Leisure Centre.

title: Doncaster: Scawthorpe flooding defences proposals (consultation)
description: City of Doncaster Council published proposals for flooding defences in Scawthorpe, describing measures such as sustainable drainage and attenuation to reduce surface water flood risk for local residents.
statusRationale: The council has published consultation materials for proposed flood defences, indicating the scheme is in development and engagement phase.
locationDescription: Scawthorpe, Doncaster (surface water flooding locations referenced in consultation)
locationSource: City of Doncaster Council consultation page

evidence.title: Scawthorpe Flooding Defences Consultation
evidence.summary: Council consultation page setting out proposed flooding defences for Scawthorpe and inviting feedback.

title: Hartlepool: PS Wingfield Castle Phase 2 works procurement
description: Hartlepool Borough Council published a tender notice for Phase 2 works on PS Wingfield Castle, supporting the conservation and continued operation of a historic vessel as part of the town’s waterfront heritage and visitor offer.
statusRationale: A UK4 tender notice has been published for Phase 2 works, indicating the project is being procured ahead of delivery.
locationDescription: PS Wingfield Castle, Hartlepool (waterfront heritage asset)

evidence.title: PS Wingfield Castle Phase 2 Works (tender notice)
evidence.summary: Tender notice for Phase 2 works associated with PS Wingfield Castle, issued by Hartlepool Borough Council.

title: Mansfield: White Hart Street housing-led regeneration contract award
description: Mansfield District Council published an awarded works contract for development at White Hart Street, covering delivery of new homes and commercial space as part of town-centre regeneration and place-making.
statusRationale: A Contracts Finder award notice has been published with supplier and contract dates, indicating the project has moved into delivery.

evidence.title: Mansfield District Council - White Hart Street (award notice)
evidence.summary: Award notice for works contract covering development of homes and commercial space at White Hart Street, including contract value and dates.

title: North East Lincolnshire: construction starts on Freshney Place development site
description: North East Lincolnshire Council announced that construction had started on the Freshney Place development site in Grimsby, supporting town-centre regeneration and reuse of a key retail area.
statusRationale: The council reports that construction has started on the site, indicating the project is in delivery.

evidence.title: Construction has started this week on Freshney Place development site
evidence.summary: Council news item stating that construction has started on the Freshney Place development site in Grimsby.

title: Ribble Valley: Clitheroe Castle Keep structural repairs procurement
description: Ribble Valley Borough Council published a tender notice for structural repairs to Clitheroe Castle Keep, supporting ongoing conservation and safe operation of the historic civic heritage asset.

title: Braintree: construction starts on new community centre in Witham

title: Mole Valley: 21 High Street, Leatherhead conversion works contract award
description: Mole Valley District Council published a contract details notice for conversion works at 21 High Street, Leatherhead, changing the principal use from office to residential as part of town-centre regeneration and re-use of existing buildings.
statusRationale: A UK7 contract details notice has been published naming the supplier and contract dates, indicating the works contract is awarded and scheduled for delivery.

title: Warrington: Liverpool Road (Sankey Bridges) drainage upgrades and pump station to reduce flooding
description: Warrington Borough Council advanced a flood-risk management scheme at Liverpool Road, Sankey Bridges, including drainage upgrades and a new pump station to reduce flood risk for local properties and improve resilience of the highway corridor.
statusRationale: The council has approved and publicly described the scheme and reports delivery activity including contractor appointment and progress updates.
locationDescription: Liverpool Road, Sankey Bridges (Great Sankey South), Warrington
locationSource: Warrington Borough Council (news and project information)

evidence.title: New pump station to tackle flooding
evidence.summary: Council news item describing cabinet approval for a new drainage system and pump station at Liverpool Road, Sankey Bridges, to reduce flood risk to local properties.

evidence.title: Liverpool Road Flood Risk Management Scheme
evidence.summary: Council project page describing the Liverpool Road flood risk management scheme scope, delivery timeline and progress updates.

title: Arun: Holly Court cladding and window replacement works contract award
description: Arun District Council published an awarded works contract for cladding and window replacement at Holly Court, supporting building safety and estate improvement works within the council’s housing portfolio.
statusRationale: A Contracts Finder award notice has been published, indicating the contract for cladding and window replacement works has been awarded.

title: Southwark: works begin on new civic square at Peckham Rye Station
description: The London Borough of Southwark announced the start of works to deliver a new civic square at Peckham Rye Station, transforming the station forecourt and surrounding public realm to improve access, safety and the town centre environment.
statusRationale: The council reports that works have begun on site, indicating active delivery of the public realm scheme.
locationDescription: Peckham Rye Station and station square/forecourt, Southwark

evidence.title: Work begins on transformative new civic square at Peckham Rye Station
evidence.summary: Council announcement stating that construction has started to deliver a new civic square at Peckham Rye Station as part of public realm improvements.
